category_sources: Official SourceForge project categorizes dbacl as Email Spam Filter, Text Processing, and Artificial Intelligence.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading uses dbacl at https://dbacl.sourceforge.net/.
docs_sources: Official dbacl contents page includes overview, tutorial, spam filtering, and UNIX manual pages.
Official homepage describes dbacl as a set of lightweight UNIX/POSIX utilities for classifying text documents.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page has Code and Git navigation for dbacl.
Official dbacl contents page links CVS from the project navigation; SourceForge project page also exposes Git.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes automatic text classification and junk email filtering with lightweight UNIX/POSIX utilities.
SourceForge categories list Email Spam Filter and Text Processing.
